EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IPolycurve

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that define operations common to polylines and the boundaries of polygons.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("4AFF82E0-F984-11D1-BCA7-0000F875BCCE")]
public interface IPolycurve : ICurve, IGeometry

Methods

Densify(double, double)

Converts this polycurve into a piecewise linear approximation of itself.

void Densify(double maxSegmentLength, double maxDeviation)

Parameters

maxSegmentLength double
maxDeviation double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Generalize(double)

Generalizes this polycurve using the Douglas-Peucker algorithm.

Parameters

maxAllowableOffset double

Smooth(double)

Converts this curve into a smooth curve containing only Bezier curve segments.

SplitAtDistance(double, bool, bool, out bool, out int, out int)

Introduces a new vertex into this polyline at a specified distance from the beginning of the polyline.

void SplitAtDistance(double distance, bool asRatio, bool createPart, out bool SplitHappened, out int newPartIndex, out int newSegmentIndex)

Parameters

distance double
asRatio bool
createPart bool
SplitHappened bool
newPartIndex int
newSegmentIndex int

createPart bool

newPartIndex int
newSegmentIndex int

Weed(double)

Generalizes using a small tolerance based upon either the system units of the geometry's spatial reference, or the geometry's bounding box.

void Weed(double maxAllowableOffsetFactor)

Parameters

maxAllowableOffsetFactor double
